descriptors.name: prompt-0001
descriptors.content: Create a premium brand, website, and launch campaign for a forensic consultancy in Dubai named Veritas Forensics.

truth_profile.description: Synthetic prompt-only workflow truth profile: identity, audience, contact, regulatory, and market expectations for the example brand-context compilation

slots.why_needed: audience determines tone, channels, and proof-point selection
no contact facts exist in prompt-only mode; required before any publication surface
every output renders the name; a wrong or conflicting name is publication-critical

slots.description: regulatory constraints for forensic services marketing in the UAE
slots.why_needed: affects permissible claims and CTA language
market scoping constrains claims, regulation checks, and channel choices

claims.statement: The brand is a forensic consultancy operating in Dubai
claims.confidence_basis: explicit client statement in the intake prompt
claims.normalization_basis: region name taken verbatim from the cited prompt fragment; no case folding

claims.statement: The working brand name is Veritas Forensics
claims.confidence_basis: name stated verbatim in the intake prompt
claims.normalization_basis: name taken verbatim from the cited prompt fragment; no case folding, no Unicode normalization

claims.statement: The likely audience includes law firms and insurers
claims.confidence_basis: category norm for forensic consultancies; no client evidence
claims.normalization_basis: audience phrase copied from the inference statement; remains an unconfirmed inference

assumptions.statement: English-first with Arabic parity is acceptable for this Dubai-market brand
assumptions.revisit_trigger: client confirms language priorities at the facts gate
